name: family-support-platform
description: Family support platform — bridge.ruffops.com (separate from academy.ruffops.com)

scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:portal & npm run dev:admin
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=portal && npm run build --workspace=admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=portal && npm run lint --workspace=admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=portal && npm run typecheck --workspace=admin && npm run typecheck --workspace=mobile
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@family-support/core && npm run test --workspace=@family-support/data && npm run test --workspace=portal
